scope.target: Phase 1 RED coverage for project-bootstrap expanded user-help UX

findings.summary: Full blocker-matrix coverage is still partly comment/literal-driven rather than executable. The plan requires full matrix generated-message tests, but several matrix labels are present only in a comment block, and the validator accepts plain term presence in the smoke file. The executable full-matrix fixture injects only pnpm, conditional auth, public app config, secure source, and human-gate nested blockers, then checks broad output words; it does not force generated-message behavior for required families such as missing role identity, managed-path conflict, or missing pod skill.

The report language schema is not enforced on the ready report path. The plan requires the JSON report to carry user_summary.language.requested/current_user_hint/selected/fallback_reason, but the existing ready_for_bootstrap smoke case only asserts status, blockers, role, CLI, and pod-role report fields. An implementation could emit language fields only for blocked Markdown cases and still pass the current RED smoke assertions.

checks_reviewed.command: scope review against AGENTS.md, PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md, approved plan, RED evidence, changed RED files
checks_reviewed.evidence: AGENTS.md requires TDD; PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md:262-269 defines project-bootstrap source/runtime/report; plan Phase 1 requires RED smoke and validator coverage at docs/plans/active/20260613-project-bootstrap-expanded-user-help-ux-plan.md:321-335.

Recorded Phase 1 RED exit 1 is expected because current preflight does not write user_summary.language.*; see .evidence/wm/project-bootstrap/20260613-expanded-user-help-ux-red.md:18-30 and rerun note at lines 124-135.
Local read-only rerun exited 1 with expected RED failures requiring project-bootstrap docs/generator language, matrix, support-only, and login terms before Phase 2 implementation.
Phase 1 RED coverage review only; full runtime gates are planned for Phase 4.
Phase 1 RED coverage review only; local harness is planned for Phase 4.
Phase 1 RED coverage review only; workspace lint/test is planned for Phase 4.

residual_risks: This review did not execute the mutating smoke script directly; it relied on recorded RED evidence plus read-only syntax/validator checks.
No Phase 2 implementation diff or generated Korean samples were reviewed in this pass.
mobile-mcp/native visual QA is not applicable to this runtime/eval-only RED coverage phase.
